text: Healthy living involves taking care of both your body and mind. A balanced diet, with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives you energy and supports your immune system. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, helps strengthen your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep, as it allows your body to rest and repair. Finally, don't forget your mental health. Practicing relaxation techniques and maintaining a healthy work-life balance reduce stress and improve your overall mood. When you combine these elements, you feel more focused, energetic, and content in your daily life.
